title: LoadPoints Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub LoadPoints (FileName As String [, Merge As Boolean])
parameters:
FileName	A valid point file in the current project.

Merge	Optional.  Sets to integrate the current point into the specified point file.
description: Loads a SPEL+ point file into the Controller's point memory for the current robot.
see_also:
ImportPoints

SavePoints

LoadPoints Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .LoadPoints ("part1.pts")

End With

C# Example:

m_spel.LoadPoints("part1.pts");
